# Variables are expanded in include file paths
mk -n -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
# Test if variables are expanded in file names.
# deps defines deps = one two
depsfile = deps

<./$depsfile

test3.mk.o: $deps
	secondprocess ab

one:
	process bar

two:
	process rebar
-- deps --
deps = one two
extracmdarg = gopher
-- expected --
two: process rebar
one: process bar
test3.mk.o: secondprocess ab
